title: Testing interposer method and apparatus
abstract: The disclosure describes a novel method and apparatus for improving silicon interposers to include test circuitry for testing stacked die mounted on the interposer. The improvement allows for the stacked die to be selectively tested by an external tester or by the test circuitry included in the interposer.
claims: 1. An interposer comprising: a first face; a second face; test access port circuitry including a test data input coupled to the first face, a test clock input coupled to the first face, a test mode select input coupled to the first face, a test data output coupled to the first face, and control output; stimulus generator circuitry including a first input coupled to the control output of the test access port circuitry, wherein the stimulus generator circuitry further includes a stimulus output; and a first multiplexer including a first data input coupled to the first face, a second data input coupled to the stimulus output, a control input coupled to the control output of the test access port circuitry, and an output coupled to the second face.
